userInput:
video_goal: showcase the ClearVu IQ platform at a vendor demo fair 
target_audience: potential buyer, GPO 
company_or_brand_name: ClearVu IQ 
key_points: AI predicted number reduces linen purchase waste 
tone_and_style: professional & casual
format_or_platform: demo fair, company landing page
desired_length:  "60-90 seconds"
constraints: N/A 
show_face: No
cta: book a demo today
user inputs: 
* Create a 1-minute promotional video showcasing the ClearVu-IQ linen management system.
* The design will represent the ClearVu-IQ brand.
* Utilize the brand elements such as logo and primary color palette.
* Position the linen management philosophy at the forefront of the brand.
* Showcase ClearVu-IQ’s unique value proposition: cost savings, AI-powered predictive ordering, OCR-based delivery validation, and easy implementation.
* Visually demonstrate how ClearVu-IQ transforms hospital linen logistics into an intelligent, streamlined process.
* Appeal to healthcare decision-makers: supply chain managers, hospital administrators, and IT leads.
